title: AGENTS.md pre-seeded correctly in tenant workspace
evidence: tests/integration/tc-012.test.ts (3 tests) passed in ~22ms. All three merge scenarios verified: 1. AGENTS.md created from real templates/workspace/ dir with `## Task Execution` section 2. AGENTS.md with section already present left byte-for-byte identical 3. AGENTS.md without section gets `## Task Execution` appended after existing content Overall suite: 325 tests passed (48 files)
